ASR Outdoor 20pc Beach Combing Metal Detector Gold Panning Kit Serrated Digger

Get in on the gold rush and add the ASR Outdoor Beach Digger Gold Panning Kit to your summer activity list! This gold panning kit has everything you need from gold recovery to gold storage, making it an accessible and comprehensive assortment of gold panning tools for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike. The gold panning kit includes twenty-one pieces to help you in your gold, gem or mineral recovery efforts:

- x1 black drawstring bag - x1 1/20" Mesh Classifier Sifting Screen - x1 orange sand scoop - x1 10bs magnetic separator tool - x1 pen separator - x4 plastic pipettes - x2 magnifier tweezers - x1 green steel sand digger - x6 glass vials - x2 small plastic snifter bottle

Key Features

  • GOLD RUSH READY: Get ready to mine for gold on your next gold panning adventure with the ASR Outdoor Beach Digger Kit; this gold panning kit has everything you need from gold recovery to gold storage, making it an accessible and comprehensive assortment of gold panning tools for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike
  • KIT INCLUDES: The gold panning kit includes one black drawstring bag, one orange sand scoop, one 16lbs pick up tool, one pen separator, four plastic pipettes, two magnifier tweezers, one green steel sand digger, six glass vials and two small plastic snifter bottle; 21 total units
  • PERFECT FOR A BEACH COMB: Take this gold panning kit to your local beach, lake or river to mine for gold; this kit is great for a beach comb, specifically with the included orange plastic sand scoop and green steel digger shovel to help you dig through sand and other rocky materials
  • COMPACT AND PORTABLE: The ASR Outdoor gold panning beach digger kit conveniently fits all the gold prospecting kit equipment and tools in the included black drawstring backpack, so you can easily tote and pack the kit with you for day trips, camping adventures, beach days and much more
  • TOP GEAR EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this gold panning beach digger kit is made from quality material from the high impact, durable plastic gold pan and sand scoop to the metal magnifying tweezers and green steel digger shovel; all these gold mining tools will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROBDBPK20
  • UPC: 855569008246
  • Color: Black
  • Size: Beach Digger Kit

This gold prospecting beach digger kit is great for a beach comb! Take it to your local beach, lake or riverbed, this gold panning kit is specifically great for sandy areas because of the included orange plastic sand scoop, as well as the green steel digger shovel to help you dig through sand and other rocky material deposits.

The gold panning equipment and tools included in the gold mining kit are made from quality materials. From the high impact, durable plastic gold pan and sand scoop to the metal magnifying tweezers and green steel digger shovel; all these gold mining tools will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come! And, conveniently, all the gold panning kit components mentioned above fit into the black drawstring backpack, so you can easily tote and pack the kit with you for outdoor day trips, camping adventures, family beach days, and much more.

Happy prospecting!
